code: import api from'./api';export const courseService={async getAll(){const response=await api.get('/courses');return response.data.courses;},async getMyCourses(){const response=await api.get('/courses/my');return response.data.courses;},async getById(id){const response=await api.get(`/courses/${id}`);return response.data.course;},async create(name,code,description){const response=await api.post('/courses',{name,code,description});return response.data.course;},async join(courseId){const response=await api.post(`/courses/${courseId}/join`);return response.data.course;}};
